title: BJP attacking Bengali culture, pride: Kejriwal; Modi won’t have his way in Bengal: Tejashwi
description: AAP convenor Arvind Kejriwal and RJD leader Tejaswi Yadav are campaigning in the State in support of Trinamool Congress even as Congress leader Rahul Gandhi has launched scathing attacks on Trinamool Congress government and Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee
